uplink._note: Derived from the TTN example input with the trailing status byte cleared to 0 to exercise the 'closed' contact state. All measurement fields are produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (battery 2.97 V, temperature 21.7 C, counter 1793198, status 0); the normalization (contactState 'closed', openCloseCount, eventStatus) is authored here.

uplink.description: Keepalive/data frame, external thermistor disconnected, low counter
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: byte[2] bit2 set => thermistor disconnected; battery byte 200 (3.2 V), 10-bit temperature raw 50 (5.0 C), 24-bit counter 5, status 0 (closed). Expected measurement values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input; normalization authored here.

uplink.description: Payload too short to contain an 8-byte keepalive frame
uplink._note: Error vector: the upstream decoder reads bytes[3..7] out of bounds and emits garbage (e.g. temperature 76.8). This codec guards the frame length and returns an error instead.
